response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates exceptional software engineering skills and 20+ years of experience including performance optimization on latency-critical systems, they lack the specialized expertise required for this role. The position demands deep knowledge of SoC design, IP modeling, GPU architecture, and AI accelerator optimization—areas not evidenced in their primarily software-focused career. Their recent work in AI infrastructure appears to be developer tooling rather than hardware-software co-design.
strengths: 20+ years of software engineering with strong systems programming (C, C++, D) background
Proven track record optimizing performance in latency-critical systems handling millions of requests/second at scale
Experienced technical leader with software craftsmanship expertise and mentoring experience
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC design, IP modeling, or hardware architecture fundamentals
Lacks background in GPU architecture, AI accelerator optimization, or deep learning workload analysis
Career is primarily software-focused with no evidence of hardware-software co-design or cloud infrastructure optimization for specialized hardware

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or GPU optimization background
